name: X-Force Risky IP, Malware
notes: This rule will detect when a local user or host is connecting to a malware host
conditions_text: when the context is Local to Remote, Remote to Remote
when Destination IP is categorized by X-Force as Malware with confidence value greater than 85
TD_list: APPLY X-Force Risky IP, Malware on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the context is Local to Remote, Remote to Remote
AND when Destination IP is categorized by X-Force as Malware with confidence value greater than 85
RED_list: Event name: X-Force Risky IP - Malware
Event description: A local user or host is connecting to a malware host
